titleStmt.title: SII 24.94: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 94. (A.R. No. 115 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Fragmentary. The details after the praśasti are completely lost. The inscription is dated in the 41st year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻcūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayarmunaik kon=taḷavaracar tan=taḷamiriya vāḷurai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭip porpala naṭātti kirttiyai niruttit tonnilaven
tarcūṭa munnai manuvāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppa ceṅkol ticaitoruñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunilaviḷākan Eṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷirum viṭṭa tanmānamuṅ kūṟina viramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟinamalaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta natikaḷum cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭalkaḷun talaivirittalamarak kuṭaticai tannāṭukantu tānu
ṭalamum ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oruvicaikkaik koṇṭīṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅkoḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittaraṅkamum poruparikkulaṅkaḷun tantiravāriyum Uṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal tenkaṭal paṭarvatu polat tan peruñcenai Evip pañcavaraivarum poruta poṟkkaḷa
pamu muttamiṭ potiyinu mattaveṅka maiyyaccayya muṅ kanniyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭi kaṭal malai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟellān=tani vicum peṟa māveṟiya tanvarutaniṟṟalaivaraik kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷittiṟaṅkoḷ siṅhāsana ntiriya viṭṭaruḷip poṅkoḷiyā
Eḻulakamuṭaiyāḷ vāḻi malarntinitirup[pa ]yum Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷiruppa virasiṅhāsanattu viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājakesari panmarāna( tripuvana) tripuvanacakkaravattikaḷ śrīkolottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 1 Āvatu pāṇṭikulācanivaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkattāḻvār kanmikaḷum civayiṣṇava muṭaiyān
Digital edition of SII 24.94 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
